# Included data

(ref:table-effsize-overview) Overview of data included

```{r table-effsize-overview}
overview_table_data_clean <- overview_table_data %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(
    authors,
    conducted,
    procedure_id,
    n_participants,
    n_statements,
    truth_rating_scale,
    d_control,
    d_art,
    rel_control,
    rel_art
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    conducted = as.character(round(conducted, 0)),
    procedure_id = as.character(round(procedure_id, 0)),
    n_participants = as.character(round(n_participants, 0)),
    n_statements = as.character(round(n_statements, 0)),
    publication = paste0(authors, " (", conducted, ")")
  ) %>% 
  select(-authors, -conducted) %>% 
  select(publication, everything())

apa_table(overview_table_data_clean,
          caption = "Overview of data included")
```
